cad_masters.notes: Starter parametric scaffold (bore/mouthpiece-socket/bell + tone-hole placeholder stubs). All dimensions are measurement-required seed values from family-spec.csv CLN-V5-STUDY-001. Not fabrication authority.
Acoustic-law planning row (CLN-V5-STUDY-001) for a cylindrical single-reed woodwind. No dimension_status besides starter_only; bore length and tone holes require measurement.
Source-only (not executed); L1/L2 analysis-support scaffold, not runtime evidence.
